Document:
# Optional Crimes These crimes can be added on to existing charges where relevant.
## Resisting Arrest To resist a lawful arrest or search by an officer. - 5 minutes, refusing to comply with a lawful search or arrest. - 10 minutes, resisting a legal arrest by fleeing or using force.
## Aiding and Abetting Assisting others in committing a crime, directly or indirectly, or encouraging them to commit one. Any person Aiding and Abetting is required to be told the crimes of the person they aided. - Same punishment as crime committed.
## Disorderly Conduct in Confinement To cause disruption in a significant manner while in Brig and under arrest. This can be added on to any charge. - 7 minutes.
